00523.summary: Build a reusable library for drag-and-drop, resizable grid editing.

01759.summary: Follow TDD for all implementation work
01759.content: Build the library using a test-driven workflow: add a failing test for each behavior before implementing it.

02c3f.summary: Support fixed, constrained, and free-flowing shapes
02c3f.content: Support three shape behavior modes in the editor: fixed shapes, constrained shapes with minimum and maximum bounds, and free-flowing shapes that may overlap other shapes.

03260.summary: Flutter package for editing shapes on a grid
03260.content: This project is a Flutter package that provides an editor for arranging shapes against a grid. The editor must support fixed shapes, shapes with min/max size constraints, and free-flowing shapes that may overlap other shapes.

0d1ef.content: Support two non-overlapping fixed-style variants: one fully frozen variant with fixed position and fixed size, and one variant with fixed size but free-flowing position.

0efd0.summary: Restore non-overlapping shapes to their last valid state
0efd0.content: When a shape that does not support overlap is dragged or resized into an overlapping state, it should immediately restore to its prior valid snapped position and size instead of remaining overlapped.
